---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
title-block-banner: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(glue)

# Helper: render a CV entry as HTML
cv_entry <- function(
  title,
  subtitle = NULL,
  location = NULL,
  date = NULL,
  details = NULL
) {
  out <- glue("**{title}**")
  parts <- c()
  if (!is.null(location) && location != "") {
    parts <- c(parts, location)
  }
  if (!is.null(date) && date != "") {
    parts <- c(parts, date)
  }
  if (length(parts) > 0) {
    out <- glue("{out} | {paste(parts, collapse = ' | ')}")
  }
  out <- paste0(out, "\n")
  if (!is.null(subtitle) && subtitle != "") {
    out <- paste0(out, glue(": {subtitle}\n"))
  }
  if (!is.null(details) && details != "") {
    out <- paste0(out, glue(": {details}\n"))
  }
  out <- paste0(out, "\n")
  out
}
```

<a href="images/cv.pdf" class="btn btn-primary btn-cv-download" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
{{< fa file-pdf >}} View PDF
</a>

## Education

```{r}
#| label: education
#| output: asis
education <- read.csv("data/education.csv")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(education))) {
  row <- education[i, ]
  date_str <- paste(row$start, "-", row$end)
  cat(cv_entry(row$title, row$description, row$location, date_str))
}
```

## Qualifications

```{r}
#| label: qualifications
#| output: asis
qualifications <- read.csv("data/qualifications.csv")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(qualifications))) {
  row <- qualifications[i, ]
  cat(cv_entry(row$title, row$description, row$location, row$date, row$detail))
}
```

## Work Experience

```{r}
#| label: work
#| output: asis
work <- read.csv("data/work.csv")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(work))) {
  row <- work[i, ]
  date_str <- paste(row$start, "-", row$end)
  cat(cv_entry(row$title, row$description, row$location, date_str))
}
```

## Leadership Roles

```{r}
#| label: roles
#| output: asis
roles <- read.csv("data/roles.csv")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(roles))) {
  row <- roles[i, ]
  cat(cv_entry(row$title, row$organisation, date = row$date))
}
```

## Research

**Principal Investigator**

```{r}
#| label: research
#| output: asis
research <- read.csv("data/research.csv")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(research))) {
  row <- research[i, ]
  cat(glue("- **{row$acronym}** - {row$title}\n"))
}
```

## Skills

```{r}
#| label: skills
#| output: asis
skills <- read.csv("data/skills.csv")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(skills))) {
  row <- skills[i, ]
  cat(glue("**{row$category}** | {row$description}\n\n"))
}
```
